# AiPay

> AiPay automates Kaspi Pay payments for businesses in Kazakhstan — invoice creation by phone number, instant payment verification, webhook notifications, and fiscal receipts. Works via API, dashboard, or ready-made integrations. Supports any channel: Telegram, WhatsApp, Instagram, CRM, website, 1C, and more.

## Main

- [Home](https://aipay.kz/): Overview of AiPay — features, pricing, how it works, use cases by business type (Instagram shops, infobusiness, beauty, retail, restaurants, medical centers).
- [For Developers](https://aipay.kz/developers): Landing page for developers — API overview, integration flow, FAQ. Full REST API documentation at https://cabinet.aipay.kz/doc (invoice creation, payment status webhooks, Postman collection, Python/Node.js code examples, sandbox environment).
- [Blog](https://aipay.kz/blog): Articles on Kaspi Pay automation, payment verification, and integrations.
  - [Kaspi Pay для доставки еды: автоматизация оплат](https://aipay.kz/ru/blog/kaspi-pay-avtomatizaciya-dostavka): How restaurants and food delivery services in Kazakhstan automate Kaspi Pay via webhooks and Telegram bots.
  - [Kaspi Pay + CRM: интеграция через AiPay API](https://aipay.kz/ru/blog/kaspi-pay-crm-integraciya): How to connect Kaspi Pay to Bitrix24, AmoCRM, or a custom ERP via AiPay API — with code examples.
  - [Kaspi Pay для медцентра: автоматизация оплат](https://aipay.kz/ru/blog/kaspi-pay-dlya-medtsentra): How a medical center eliminated 65 hours of manual work per month using AiPay — automatic invoices, fiscal receipts, fewer no-shows.
  - [Kaspi Pay для Instagram-магазина](https://aipay.kz/ru/blog/kaspi-pay-instagram-magazin): How to eliminate fake Kaspi payment screenshots and automate payment verification for Instagram sellers.
  - [Kaspi Pay для Telegram-бота: webhook за 1 час](https://aipay.kz/ru/blog/kaspi-pay-telegram-bot-webhook): Step-by-step guide to connecting Kaspi Pay webhooks to a Telegram bot via AiPay API, with Python code.
  - [Kaspi Pay webhook: что это и как настроить](https://aipay.kz/ru/blog/kaspi-pay-webhook-nastroyka): What Kaspi Pay webhooks are, why they don't exist natively, and how to add event-driven payment notifications via AiPay.

## Integrations

- [AiPay + Altegio](https://aipay.kz/integrations/altegio): Automatic pre-payment for bookings via Kaspi Pay. Client books → receives Kaspi invoice → pays → booking confirmed. Reduces no-shows by 40–60%.
- [AiPay + PulseAI](https://aipay.kz/integrations/pulseai): Kaspi Pay payments inside WhatsApp bots (PulseAI). Client messages bot → invoice issued → paid → order created automatically.
- [AiPay + STIKER.AI](https://aipay.kz/integrations/stiker-ai): Kaspi Pay invoicing in WhatsApp automation scenarios via STIKER.AI.
- [AiPay + Baskaru Pro](https://aipay.kz/integrations/baskaru-pro): Kaspi Pay integration for Baskaru Pro users.

## Industries

- [Beauty Salons](https://aipay.kz/industries/beauty-salon-prepayment): Pre-payment automation for beauty salons and spas. Reduces no-shows via Kaspi Pay invoices at booking time.
- [Medical Centers](https://aipay.kz/industries/medical-center-payments): Payment automation for clinics and medical practices. Patient books → receives invoice → pays → appointment confirmed.
- [Restaurants & Delivery](https://aipay.kz/industries/restaurant-delivery-payments): Kaspi Pay payment automation for restaurants and food delivery businesses.
- [Instagram Shops](https://aipay.kz/industries/instagram-shop-kaspi-invoices): Kaspi Pay invoice automation for Instagram sellers — send invoices via DM or bot, confirm payment automatically.

## API Reference

Full interactive docs: https://cabinet.aipay.kz/doc
OpenAPI spec: https://core.aipay.kz/api/v2/openapi.yaml

### Authentication
JWT Bearer token. Obtain via `POST /api/v2/auth/login` or `POST /api/v2/auth/register`. Pass as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header.

### Invoice Endpoints
- `POST /api/v2/invoices` — Create invoice. Body: `{ pos_id, account (phone), amount, message }`. Returns invoice with `id` and `status_code`.
- `GET /api/v2/invoices/{id}` — Get invoice status.
- `PUT /api/v2/invoices/{id}/cancel` — Cancel pending invoice.
- `PUT /api/v2/invoices/{id}/refund` — Refund paid invoice.
- `GET /api/v2/invoices/{id}/events` — Full lifecycle event log for an invoice.
- `GET /api/v2/invoices` — List invoices with filters: `status`, `pos_id`, `company_id`, date range, pagination.

### Invoice Status Codes
1=created, 2=pending (sent to terminal), 3=no_account, 5=canceled (system), 7=expired, 8=canceled (user), 9=paid, 11=refunded, 12=rejected.

### Webhooks
Set `notif_url` on your company. AiPay sends `POST` to your URL on every status change.

**Invoice event payload:**
```json
{
  "event_type": "invoice_update",
  "timestamp": "RFC3339",
  "user_id": "uuid",
  "data": {
    "invoice_id": "uuid",
    "status_code": 9,
    "status": "paid",
    "amount": 5000,
    "account": "+77009876543",
    "account_name": "Иван Иванов",
    "message": "Order #123"
  }
}
```

**Device status event payload:**
```json
{
  "event_type": "device_status",
  "data": { "pos_id": "uuid", "status": "working|paused|stopped|logged_out|unassigned" }
}
```

### POS Terminal Endpoints
- `GET /api/v2/pos` — List terminals.
- `POST /api/v2/pos` — Claim a new terminal.
- `PUT /api/v2/pos/{id}/pause` / `resume` / `stop` / `logout` — Terminal lifecycle.
- `GET /api/v2/pos/{id}/events` — Terminal state-change event log.

### Other Endpoints
- `POST /api/v2/auth/register` — Register company + user.
- `POST /api/v2/auth/login` — Login, returns JWT.
- `GET /api/v2/companies` — List companies.
- `GET /api/v2/analytics/overview` — Partner-level aggregated metrics (requires PARTNER company type).

### Response Envelope
- Success: `{ "data": { ... } }` or `{ "data": [...], "meta": { "page", "limit", "total" } }`
- Error: `{ "error": { "code": "ERROR_CODE", "message": "..." } }`

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://aipay.kz/privacy): Data processing and privacy policy.
- [Terms of Service](https://aipay.kz/terms): Terms and conditions of use.

## Key Facts

- Pricing: 25,000 KZT per terminal per month (3-month minimum). 7-day free trial, no card required.
- Setup time: 1 day via API, 1 hour via dashboard.
- Languages: Russian, Kazakh, English.
- Support: WhatsApp (+7 775 522-76-23), Telegram (@DrJonah).
- AiPay does not withdraw funds or initiate outgoing transfers — only automation and accounting.
